title.en: The staff of Xuanyin Pavilion replied.

content.en:
"Eternal gold and bronze, there are some. "

The staff of Xuanyin Pavilion replied.

"I want to buy a thousand square meters of eternal gold and copper. "Ye Tian didn't expect the Xuanyin Pavilion here to have so much eternal gold and bronze, but he also had to ask, maybe there would be!

"A Thousand Eternal Gold and Bronze !!!"

The staff of Xuanyin Pavilion were also frightened, this amount was beyond his imagination!

The value of eternal gold and copper itself is very high, what is the concept of a thousand square meters of eternal gold and copper!

"This Heavenly Ancestor, our Xuanyin Pavilion doesn't have so much eternal gold and bronze!"

The staff said helplessly.

"I'll buy as much as I want. "

Ye Tian said lightly.

"I'll look it up. "

The staff left and soon returned.

"We have about sixty square meters of eternal gold and copper in this division, and this is all in stock. If you want to buy more Eternal Bronze, you'll have to go to our Central Pavilion. "

Subsequently.

The staff took the sixty square eternal gold and bronze, and several Origin Realm staff members accompanied them.

After all, when it comes to the business of sixty square eternal gold and copper, Xuanyin Pavilion also attaches great importance to it.

The currency collected by Xuanyin Pavilion is also Eternal Ancient Gold, but it is almost dominated by medium Eternal Ancient Gold, and as for the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, it is naturally also wanted.

Ye Tian took out a large amount of medium-grade eternal ancient gold and a small number of high-grade eternal ancient gold, and successfully exchanged it for sixty square eternal gold and copper.

But when Ye Tian wanted to buy the ruin god gold, Xuanyin Pavilion said that he didn't have it, and he didn't have a piece of ruin god gold.

But.

Ye Tian had purchased a piece of information from the Xuanyin Pavilion, which was about the Innocent Abyss.

Although Wind Tooth Island also knows a lot of information about the Innocent Abyss, some of the information is outdated.

And Xuanyin Pavilion undoubtedly knows more about the Innocent Abyss, and it is undoubtedly worth spending a little Eternal Ancient Gold to buy the information of the Innocent Abyss.

The reason why Ye Tian bought the Innocent Abyss Intelligence was that he was ready to enter the Innocent Abyss.

According to the information he knew, there was the ruin god gold in the Innocent Abyss.

The reason why the ruin god gold is so precious is not only a matter of function, but also the reason for its rarity.

There are only a few places on the other side of the Eternal Shore where the Ruin God Gold can be born, and they are all extremely dangerous, and many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors will fall at every turn.

As a result, even Xuanyin Pavilion was unable to purchase a piece of Ruin God Gold.

......

The Unsullied Abyss.

This is an abyss that spans the entire Origin Black River, and also encloses the entire central part, and its area is unimaginably large, and it is also divided into many areas, each with a different degree of danger.

The most dangerous area, even the origin of the upper realm is dangerous.

But even the least dangerous area is not something that ordinary Origin Realm can enter, and it will fall if you are not careful.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a certain area of the Innocent Abyss, and when he entered the Innocent Abyss from here, he would come to the Thousand Caves Snake Domain of the Innocent Abyss.

The Thousand Cave Snake Domain has a large number of one kind of demon snakes, these demon snakes are very difficult to entangle, once killed, they will merge into the other demon snakes, making the strength of other demon snakes stronger.

In the end, a demon snake that far surpasses itself may be born.

Once.

There was a Origin Middle Realm, and it was the top Origin Origin Middle Realm, who was trapped by countless demon snakes, killed for a long time, and finally gave birth to a demon snake comparable to the Origin Upper Realm, and killed this Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

There was also a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor who went there and performed an incomparably terrifying supreme technique on the other side, killing countless demon snakes in an instant, and as a result, a few demon snakes survived, and a demon snake comparable to the Origin Upper Realm was directly born, which scared the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor to flee directly.

Even the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm couldn't help those demon snakes, and Ye Tian naturally couldn't help it.

But he can't help the demon snakes, he can join the demon snakes!

"I have the ability to copy my body, as long as I see a demon snake, I can copy a demon snake, so as to join it, and I can find the ruin god gold in the Thousand Caves Snake Domain. "

The Thousand Caves Snake Domain is also the place where Ye Tian knew that the ruin god gold was born, and the origin of the first heavenly ancestor found the ruin god gold here and successfully escaped.

As for how much ruin god gold there is, it's not clear.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew directly into the Innocent Abyss.

The next moment.

A huge demonic snake appeared, and with a roar, the void shattered, and a terrifying impact came.

And Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly killed this demon snake with one move.

And through the talent of copying, he knew the true racial name of this demon snake.

【Unsullied Demon Serpent】

Subsequently.

He quickly withdrew, leaving the Innocent Abyss.

And just after he left, the Innocent Demon Snakes stared at him, but they didn't come out.

The rules of the Unsullied Abyss bind any creature here, making it impossible for them to leave.

Otherwise, the creatures of the Innocent Abyss will rush out, and it will be a great disaster.

Soon.

These Unsullied Demon Serpents went down.

And Ye Tian probed into the Innocent Abyss with one hand and began to copy the body of the Innocent Demon Snake, once it was copied, it would appear directly in the Innocent Abyss.

Time passed slowly, and soon an Innocent Demon Snake was copied by Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!

The Innocent Demon Snake of the Origin Realm appeared, but this was Ye Tian's copy body.

Next.

Ye Tian used this replica body to infiltrate the Thousand Cave Snake Domain, and the other Innocent Demon Snakes did not attack Ye Tian.

In the eyes of the other Innocent Demon Snakes, Ye Tian was also one of their clansmen, so naturally they would not attack Ye Tian!

In this way, Ye Tian mixed into the Innocent Demon Snake clan.

After that, he searched for the ruin god gold in the Thousand Caves Snake Domain.

Time passes.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found some ruin god gold, which was found inside the lair of a certain unsullied demon snake, and the other party superimposed some ruin god gold with other metal materials to form a snake nest.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took advantage of the other party's absence and directly took these ruin god gold, along with other materials.

"This time, I have obtained about twenty pieces of ruin god gold, which is a huge harvest!"

After that, he continued to search for the ruin god gold.

As the years passed, he found one piece after another of the ruin god gold.

According to this harvest, he gathered 10,000 pieces of ruin god gold, and it was just around the corner!

"I thought that the most difficult thing was the ruin god gold, but I didn't expect it to be so easy!" Ye Tian was overjoyed.

But this is also the ability that he has to copy his body, as a Sullied Demon Snake to find the Ruin God Gold here, if it is replaced by other Origin Realm, even if it is the Origin Upper Realm, it is not easy to collect the Ruin God Gold here!~
